'''Maidtha Fait''' was a [[Gambling/Legends|gambler]] who served with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Fait was at the [[Rebel outpost (Taul)|Rebel outpost]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taul/Legends|Taul]] when the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Dominator (Victory-class)|''Dominator'']] [[Battle of Taul|invaded]] the world. Fait led [[Darius squad]], a unit of eleven veteran [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] during the ensuing battle.<ref name="UG" />

Fait was armed with a [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] and a [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]], and was equipped with a [[Camouflage Suit]]. Fait was also skilled in [[Melee weapon/Legends|melee combat]], and was also trained in survival and first aid.<ref name="UG" />
